_note: Mini smoke fixtures for TextVQA. Synthesised in-house from CC-BY photos of public signage; no upstream image pixels are checked into this repo. Each `imagePath` is a deterministic placeholder that the runtime / scorer only needs to be able to open — for smoke runs the runner uses a 1x1 PNG placeholder under samples/_placeholder.png. References mirror the VQAv2 10-answer convention so the soft-score scorer is exercised.

samples.question: What word is written on the orange sign?
What is the time on the clock?
What number is printed on the jersey?
What city is on the airport sign?
What does the small label on the bottle say?
